---
title: "Phase 1: Comparative Genomics"
author: "Geoffrey Ochieng"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Phase 1: Comparative Genomics

## Objectives

- [ ] Retrieve sequences for ATPase γ and related genes
- [ ] Generate multiple sequence alignments
- [ ] Calculate dN/dS (omega) values
- [ ] Test for purifying selection

## Data

*To be added during Phase 1*

## Methods

*To be added during Phase 1*

## Results

*To be added during Phase 1*
